market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is bearish with heavy focus on the 15%+ crypto crash and QQQ weakness, amplifying risk-off flows. Short interest signals remain elevated in tech names per recent flow scans.

NVDA at 213.70 after sector rotation talk on X; pre-market scans indicate light positive gamma exposure that could lift the name back above 215 by close.
TSLA at 419.09 with X volume dominated by delivery concerns and crypto correlation; short interest data points to continued downside pressure through the session.
